'''Arodoni''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]],<ref name="TEA" /> located in the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It occupied the eighth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Domir/Legends|Domir]] and was orbited by eighteen [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arodoni was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />
